name: Lindsey Graham
subject: re:: Help me fight back!
body:
Within hours of announcing my campaign, the attacks began. I need your immediate help to fight back. I wanted to make sure you saw the email below. I have never backed down from a fight and with your help, we can win this, do what needs to be done to protect our homeland, and tackle the big issues facing our country.

**[Please help me fight back](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r)**. Thanks.

\- Lindsey

| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

Within hours of announcing my campaign for president, the attacks on my record began. **I need your immediate help to fight back.**

[**Will you show your support by making a critically needed contribution of $25 or more right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r)

I am running for president to keep our nation safe and carry on the promise of America. I have the experience, judgment and will to deny the most radical regimes the most dangerous weapons. **But Friend, because of my outspoken leadership on foreign policy, those who favor President Obama's dangerous approach of "leading from behind" are determined to stop me.**

When I am president, our country will no longer be governed by weak and feckless policies that put our national security at risk. We will stand with our allies, especially Israel, and fight back against terrorism. **We will _defeat_ the enemies trying to kill us. We won't just penalize our enemies or contain them; we'll _defeat_ them.**

But in order to get there, we must accomplish a lot in the next 18 months. I launched my campaign on Monday in South Carolina, and today I'm in New Hampshire taking my message directly to voters. This campaign will certainly not be easy, but with your support we can take our nation back. [**Will you stand with me?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r)

**Simply put, I have more experience with our national security than any other candidate.** I know the players - both friends and enemies alike. More importantly, they know me. I've been to the Middle East dozens of times, both in my capacity as a U.S. Senator and as a reserve officer in the United States Air Force. **I have spent much of my adult life as part of a team committed to defending America.**

**Politicians focus on elections. The military focuses on the mission.** If given the privilege to serve as your president, I'll focus on the mission - to defend America, protect our way of life, and leave the next generation a stronger, safer nation than we inherited.

In order to govern the country and focus on the mission, we must first win an incredibly competitive presidential race. Campaigns are extremely costly, and your donation today will ensure we have the funds to fight back against the attacks and reach voters across the nation. [**In order to run a winning campaign, I need your immediate support.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r)

**If you agree we need a strong America, then please stand with me today.**

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **The attacks against my record have already begun, and I need your help to fight back.** I promise a hard-hitting and honest fight, but I need your immediate help to ensure we have the funds needed to do so. [**Please send whatever you can afford today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r) Thanks, Lindsey

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

name: Barry Bennett, Carson America
subject: An exclusive offer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28197492:27098461234:m:1:876315805:8B11D5449DB368C31E1F53FB1149EA68:r)
---
|

Peter,

Our campaign just commissioned an exclusive lithograph of Dr. Carson for our most generous supporters, which you can see below.

**They are hand-signed by Dr. Carson, numbered, and only available for a limited time - and we'll be sending them to every supporter who gives $100 or more.

[ I know Ben would be honored if you'd consider making a gift today before we run out](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28197492:27098461234:m:1:876315805:8B11D5449DB368C31E1F53FB1149EA68:r).**

I hope that when you look at this portrait, you see a man at peace, a man of conviction, a man who is deeply humbled by your support and your patriotic heart.

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28197492:27098461234:m:1:876315805:8B11D5449DB368C31E1F53FB1149EA68:r)
---

By making a donation today to Carson America, you will be helping us in a number of very tangible ways.

Since Ben's announcement last month, he's had a heavy travel schedule through the early voting states of Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada. Both our state-level and national staff is working very hard to put together events, recruit and organize volunteers, and most importantly, get Ben's message out to the voters.

**All of this work is expensive, and your support is absolutely crucial. **

And because we want our donors to also feel they've gotten something important in return, our campaign has commissioned this hand-signed, exclusive lithograph.

**[I hope you'll consider making a gift of $100 or more to Carson America right now to receive yours, before we run out.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28197492:27098461234:m:1:876315805:8B11D5449DB368C31E1F53FB1149EA68:r)**

Thank you for continued prayers and support.

Sincerely,

Barry Bennett
Campaign Manager
Carson America

name: D. Peter Willis
subject: Fwd: : Help me fight back!
body:
Excuse the junk email address :-)

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Lindsey Graham** <[campaign@lindseygraham.com](mailto:campaign@lindseygraham.com)>
Date: Thu, Jun 4, 2015 at 10:02 AM
Subject: re:: Help me fight back!
To: Friend <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)>

__
Within hours of announcing my campaign, the attacks began. I need your immediate help to fight back. I wanted to make sure you saw the email below. I have never backed down from a fight and with your help, we can win this, do what needs to be done to protect our homeland, and tackle the big issues facing our country.

**Please help me fight back**. Thanks.

\- Lindsey

| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

Within hours of announcing my campaign for president, the attacks on my record began. **I need your immediate help to fight back.**

**Will you show your support by making a critically needed contribution of $25 or more right now?**

I am running for president to keep our nation safe and carry on the promise of America. I have the experience, judgment and will to deny the most radical regimes the most dangerous weapons. **But Friend, because of my outspoken leadership on foreign policy, those who favor President Obama 's dangerous approach of "leading from behind" are determined to stop me.**

When I am president, our country will no longer be governed by weak and feckless policies that put our national security at risk. We will stand with our allies, especially Israel, and fight back against terrorism. **We will _defeat_ the enemies trying to kill us. We won't just penalize our enemies or contain them; we'll _defeat_ them.**

But in order to get there, we must accomplish a lot in the next 18 months. I launched my campaign on Monday in South Carolina, and today I'm in New Hampshire taking my message directly to voters. This campaign will certainly not be easy, but with your support we can take our nation back. **Will you stand with me?**

**Simply put, I have more experience with our national security than any other candidate.** I know the players - both friends and enemies alike. More importantly, they know me. I've been to the Middle East dozens of times, both in my capacity as a U.S. Senator and as a reserve officer in the United States Air Force. **I have spent much of my adult life as part of a team committed to defending America.**

**Politicians focus on elections. The military focuses on the mission.** If given the privilege to serve as your president, I'll focus on the mission - to defend America, protect our way of life, and leave the next generation a stronger, safer nation than we inherited.

In order to govern the country and focus on the mission, we must first win an incredibly competitive presidential race. Campaigns are extremely costly, and your donation today will ensure we have the funds to fight back against the attacks and reach voters across the nation. **In order to run a winning campaign, I need your immediate support.**

**If you agree we need a strong America, then please stand with me today.**

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **The attacks against my record have already begun, and I need your help to fight back.** I promise a hard-hitting and honest fight, but I need your immediate help to ensure we have the funds needed to do so. **Please send whatever you can afford today.** Thanks, Lindsey

|

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

name: Rand Paul
subject: I'm changing the game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

It's called "conventional wisdom" in Washington, D.C.

High-powered consultants and their buddies in the media say the only path to the Presidency for the Republican Party lies in compromising our core beliefs and "selling out."

They push "electable candidates" with Big Government track records -- and tell conservatives to swallow hard and vote for "their guy."

They say that's the only way to "reach out" to independents -- who they claim are key to winning General Election bids.

But Fellow Conservative, thanks to the support of patriots like you, new polls are showing I'm changing the game.

**[Today, I'm asking you to help keep my momentum going by chipping in $20.16 right away to help my campaign ensure as many Americans as possible see my new TV ad](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28206200:27109793793:m:1:879035888:F03D7961B3F9DDE0BE2AFC0C0AFF6834:r)**.

The truth is, my campaign is showing the true path to Republican victory is with an uncompromising defense of our constitutional freedoms.

A recent Wall Street Journal/NBC News poll shows me leading Hillary Clinton by a margin of 45%-37% among independents.

If any of my Big Government opponents in this Republican Primary had those kinds of numbers, I believe our national media would immediately declare the Republican nominating process over!

The media might not understand it. The Inside the Beltway crowd in Washington, D.C. doesn't get it.

But it's a new day in American politics.

The American people don't want Big Government under EITHER party.

They want to stop the career politicians from sinking our country further in debt.

They want to stop the ObamaCare train wreck.

They want a President who will stand and FIGHT the Washington Machine -- just like I did when I filibustered for ten-and-a-half hours and stood up to President Obama's radical NSA spying schemes.

That fight was the real deal. Renewal of the so-called "PATRIOT Act's" worst spying provisions was supposed to be a foregone conclusion. But you and I proved we can make a difference if we stand together and fight back.

I believe you and I have an opportunity to finally defeat the Washington Machine and restore both fiscal sanity and respect for Constitutional principles in Washington, D.C.

Carpe Diem, Fellow Conservative.

Let's seize the day.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28206201:27109793793:m:1:879035888:F03D7961B3F9DDE0BE2AFC0C0AFF6834:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Lindsey Graham** <[campaign@lindseygraham.com](mailto:campaign@lindseygraham.com)>
Date: Thu, Jun 4, 2015 at 10:02 AM
Subject: re:: Help me fight back!
To: Friend <[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)>

__
Within hours of announcing my campaign, the attacks began. I need your immediate help to fight back. I wanted to make sure you saw the email below. I have never backed down from a fight and with your help, we can win this, do what needs to be done to protect our homeland, and tackle the big issues facing our country.

**[Please help me fight back](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r)**. Thanks.

\- Lindsey

| |

|
Dear Friend,

Within hours of announcing my campaign for president, the attacks on my record began. **I need your immediate help to fight back.**

[**Will you show your support by making a critically needed contribution of $25 or more right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r)

I am running for president to keep our nation safe and carry on the promise of America. I have the experience, judgment and will to deny the most radical regimes the most dangerous weapons. **But Friend, because of my outspoken leadership on foreign policy, those who favor President Obama 's dangerous approach of "leading from behind" are determined to stop me.**

When I am president, our country will no longer be governed by weak and feckless policies that put our national security at risk. We will stand with our allies, especially Israel, and fight back against terrorism. **We will _defeat_ the enemies trying to kill us. We won't just penalize our enemies or contain them; we'll _defeat_ them.**

But in order to get there, we must accomplish a lot in the next 18 months. I launched my campaign on Monday in South Carolina, and today I'm in New Hampshire taking my message directly to voters. This campaign will certainly not be easy, but with your support we can take our nation back. [**Will you stand with me?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r)

**Simply put, I have more experience with our national security than any other candidate.** I know the players - both friends and enemies alike. More importantly, they know me. I've been to the Middle East dozens of times, both in my capacity as a U.S. Senator and as a reserve officer in the United States Air Force. **I have spent much of my adult life as part of a team committed to defending America.**

**Politicians focus on elections. The military focuses on the mission.** If given the privilege to serve as your president, I'll focus on the mission - to defend America, protect our way of life, and leave the next generation a stronger, safer nation than we inherited.

In order to govern the country and focus on the mission, we must first win an incredibly competitive presidential race. Campaigns are extremely costly, and your donation today will ensure we have the funds to fight back against the attacks and reach voters across the nation. [**In order to run a winning campaign, I need your immediate support.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r)

**If you agree we need a strong America, then please stand with me today.**

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **The attacks against my record have already begun, and I need your help to fight back.** I promise a hard-hitting and honest fight, but I need your immediate help to ensure we have the funds needed to do so. [**Please send whatever you can afford today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28194635:27097718674:m:1:877327319:B8F4EF5368445409BFBAD1B3B3E6CB9E:r) Thanks, Lindsey

Dear Friend,

Within hours of announcing my campaign for president, the attacks on my record began. I need your immediate help to fight back.

Will you show your support by making a critically needed contribution of $25 or more right now?

I am running for president to keep our nation safe and carry on the promise of America. I have the experience, judgment and will to deny the most radical regimes the most dangerous weapons. But Friend, because of my outspoken leadership on foreign policy, those who favor President Obama's dangerous approach of "leading from behind" are determined to stop me.

When I am president, our country will no longer be governed by weak and feckless policies that put our national security at risk. We will stand with our allies, especially Israel, and fight back against terrorism. We will defeat the enemies trying to kill us. We won't just penalize our enemies or contain them; we'll defeat them.

But in order to get there, we must accomplish a lot in the next 18 months. I launched my campaign on Monday in South Carolina, and today I'm in New Hampshire taking my message directly to voters. This campaign will certainly not be easy, but with your support we can take our nation back. Will you stand with me?

Simply put, I have more experience with our national security than any other candidate. I know the players - both friends and enemies alike. More importantly, they know me. I've been to the Middle East dozens of times, both in my capacity as a U.S. Senator and as a reserve officer in the United States Air Force. I have spent much of my adult life as part of a team committed to defending America.

Politicians focus on elections. The military focuses on the mission. If given the privilege to serve as your president, I'll focus on the mission - to defend America, protect our way of life, and leave the next generation a stronger, safer nation than we inherited.

In order to govern the country and focus on the mission, we must first win an incredibly competitive presidential race. Campaigns are extremely costly, and your donation today will ensure we have the funds to fight back against the attacks and reach voters across the nation. In order to run a winning campaign, I need your immediate support.

If you agree we need a strong America, then please stand with me today.

Sincerely,



Lindsey Graham

P.S. The attacks against my record have already begun, and I need your help to fight back. I promise a hard-hitting and honest fight, but I need your immediate help to ensure we have the funds needed to do so. Please send whatever you can afford today. Thanks, Lindsey

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: thank you!
body:
Dear Friend -

So many of you have already helped get this campaign off to a strong start. Thanks to you we were able to beat our end of month May fundraising goal, enabling us to put critical resources into our Grassroots Action Fund to support our statewide outreach activities. On issues from Maryland's public schools to getting big money out of politics we are all on the same page and ready to stand up and be counted!

There is a lot of work still to be done but together we can make it happen. You are the building blocks of this grassroots effort and your engagement is helping to build a powerful statewide grassroots network.

I will continue to be in touch with opportunities for action on issues that matter to us all. I also wanted to make sure we stay connected on social media. **[Click here to LIKE our campaign's Facebook page and stay up to date on what's going on.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e2d/70cdc2ba/47829878/3945483/754333827/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD?fref=ts&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+LIKE+our+campaignrsquos+Fa&utm_campaign=em060315&source=em060315")**

Once again, thank you for all your support!

Chris
---

Paid for Van Hollen for US Senate
---

Dear Friend,

Within hours of announcing my campaign for president, the attacks on my record began. I need your immediate help to fight back.

Will you show your support by making a critically needed contribution of $25 or more right now?

I am running for president to keep our nation safe and carry on the promise of America. I have the experience, judgment and will to deny the most radical regimes the most dangerous weapons. But Friend, because of my outspoken leadership on foreign policy, those who favor President Obama's dangerous approach of "leading from behind" are determined to stop me.

When I am president, our country will no longer be governed by weak and feckless policies that put our national security at risk. We will stand with our allies, especially Israel, and fight back against terrorism. We will defeat the enemies trying to kill us. We won't just penalize our enemies or contain them; we'll defeat them.

But in order to get there, we must accomplish a lot in the next 18 months. I launched my campaign on Monday in South Carolina, and today I'm in New Hampshire taking my message directly to voters. This campaign will certainly not be easy, but with your support we can take our nation back. Will you stand with me?

Simply put, I have more experience with our national security than any other candidate. I know the players - both friends and enemies alike. More importantly, they know me. I've been to the Middle East dozens of times, both in my capacity as a U.S. Senator and as a reserve officer in the United States Air Force. I have spent much of my adult life as part of a team committed to defending America.

In order to govern the country and focus on the mission, we must first win an incredibly competitive presidential race. Campaigns are extremely costly, and your donation today will ensure we have the funds to fight back against the attacks and reach voters across the nation. In order to run a winning campaign, I need your immediate support.

If you agree we need a strong America, then please stand with me today.

Sincerely,



Lindsey Graham

P.S. The attacks against my record have already begun, and I need your help to fight back. I promise a hard-hitting and honest fight, but I need your immediate help to ensure we have the funds needed to do so. Please send whatever you can afford today. Thanks, Lindsey
